item.evanpack.smoldering_rod.desc.line1: A magmastone-tempered rod that hums with intense heat
item.evanpack.smoldering_rod.desc.line2: Only a deranged fool could have created this...
item.evanpack.void_reaver.desc.line1: An axe corrupted by the very void itself
item.evanpack.void_reaver.desc.line2: Its never ending hunger is displayed in its radius
